title: Peppery Fluffy Argentinian Haddock Soup
description: A light, peppery soup featuring flaky haddock and tender vegetables, finished with a splash of lemon for brightness.

ingredients.name: haddock fillets
ingredients.notes: skinless, boneless, cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, carrots, celery, and potatoes; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in smoked paprika, black pepper, and salt; cook for 30 seconds to bloom the spices.
Pour in vegetable broth, add the bay leaf, and bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 15 minutes.
Add the haddock pieces, cover, and simmer until the fish is opaque and flakes easily, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the bay leaf, stir in lemon juice, and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
